_comment: Defense stat weights by position. Source: pinned defense graphic from fix-my-team Discord. Font size = importance. Awareness added for infield (DP/steal prevention).

C.name: Catcher
C.description: Awareness only. The one defense stat that matters for catchers.

1B.name: First Base
1B.description: Reaction for scooping throws. Awareness for DP potential. Composure for error avoidance.

2B.name: Second Base
2B.description: Reaction for ground balls. Awareness for DP turns and steal prevention. Composure under pressure.

SS.name: Shortstop
SS.description: Reaction for ground balls. Awareness for DP turns and steal prevention. Composure under pressure.

3B.name: Third Base
3B.description: Reaction for hot corner. Awareness for DP potential. Composure under pressure.

LF.name: Left Field
LF.description: Acrobatics for catches. Agility for range. Arm for throws home.

CF.name: Center Field
CF.description: Acrobatics for catches. Agility for range. Arm for throws.

RF.name: Right Field
RF.description: Acrobatics for catches. Agility for range. Arm for throws to third.
